subcodes.first_line: All humanity, throughout the nights and days, with utmost fervor and supplication, were imploring and yearning from the All-Sufficient, the Most High, that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمیع ناس در لیالی و ایام بکمال تضرع و اتبهال از غنی متعال سائل و آمل بودند که
subcodes.subjects: @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment
